title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models from Python code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same features as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLMs, embedders, and tool callers in LangChain apps.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-like interface); runs entirely in browser, no backend needed.

title: ollama-cli (mattw/ollama-cli)
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI wrapper around ollama with history, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot (sammcj/ollama-copilot)
summary: GitHub Copilot-like VS-Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline code suggestions.

title: ollama-gui (jasonjmcghee/ollama-gui)
summary: Minimal cross-platform desktop GUI for Ollama built with Tauri and React.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaEmbedder nodes for RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-codex (go-skynet/ollama-codex)
summary: Drop-in open-source replacement for OpenAI Codex using Ollama; provides /v1/completions endpoint.

title: ollama-rag (hmne/ollama-rag)
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain to chat with local PDFs.

title: ollama-discord-bot (gabotechs/ollama-discord-bot)
summary: Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any Discord server with slash commands.

title: ollama-nim (moigagoo/ollama-nim)
summary: Nim client library for Ollama; supports chat, generate, embeddings, and model management.

title: ollama-rs (pepperoni21/ollama-rs)
summary: Community Rust crate providing async/sync bindings for the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-dotnet (AsakusaRinne/ollama-dotnet)
summary: Unofficial .NET SDK for Ollama with chat, generate, embeddings, and model management endpoints.

title: ollama-chat (tfoldi/ollama-chat)
summary: Real-time collaborative chat app using Ollama, Next.js, and WebSockets; self-host in one click.

title: ollama-helm (otwld/ollama-helm)
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and PVC support.

title: ollama-dagger (grouville/ollama-dagger)
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI service for testing LLM-powered features in pipelines.

title: ollama-rust (mdrokz/ollama-rust)
summary: Lightweight Rust wrapper for Ollama focusing on minimal dependencies and WASM compatibility.

title: ollama-slack-bot (chris-garrett/ollama-slack-bot)
summary: Slack bot that exposes Ollama models via Slack slash commands and threaded conversations.
